text: The hallway outside the exhibition feels oddly vacant now, the goodbye echoing through quiet space. I step forward and the sharp light blends with muted reflections in the glass, pulling me inward. Inside the next room, the spectacle of R+D glows on the wall—an invitation and a reminder of the ceaseless pursuit of understanding. I feel suspended at the border between endings and possibility, uncertain but present, as the narrative concludes yet curiosity lingers. Leaving is bittersweet—there is relief, yet already I sense the tug of the next question.
